archetype: Archetype 5: Luxury (Premium, Depth, Mystery) mixed with Archetype 4 (High-Contrast Tech)
design_philosophy: Intelligent, Magical, Futuristic, Premium, Personalized, Motivating. 'An AI understands me and is helping me succeed.'

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-light to font-bold mix

glassmorphism.usage: Use for floating navs, dashboard cards, modal overlays, AI Tutor sidebar.

aurora_gradients.usage: Use as ambient background glows behind key sections and the AI Orb.

glow_borders.usage: Use for premium feature highlights and active AI states.

marketing_pages.grid: Tetris Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 to gap-12)

dashboard_pages.grid: Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6)
dashboard_pages.spacing: Dense but breathable (p-6, p-8 inside cards)
dashboard_pages.alignment: Strict grid hierarchy, utilize h-full on children.

rules.hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), increased border opacity, subtle inner glow.
rules.page_transition: Fade in with slight upward motion (y: 20 to 0).
rules.ai_orb: Continuous slow floating (y: -10 to 10), pulsing glow opacity, dynamic gradient rotation.
rules.charts: Animated drawing of lines/bars using Recharts with staggered entrance.

implementation_rules: Use <Float> for idle animations of 3D models (Heart, Brain, Solar System).
Use transparent canvas backgrounds to blend seamlessly with the glassmorphism UI.

components.buttons: Premium solid or glass. Primary CTA uses vibrant #2563EB with subtle drop shadow. Hover state brightens color.
components.cards: Cardless or Glassmorphism cards with max 12px border-radius.
components.navigation: Sticky glass header (z-50) with subtle bottom border. Mobile bottom nav for app view.
components.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='start-trial-button').

icons.style: Duotone or bold depending on emphasis. White or accent color.

images.description: Cosmic deep space abstract swirl, use for hero section background with heavy dark overlay.
Abstract flowing purple shapes on dark background for AI Tutor or Learning Studio background.
Modern futuristic library, use for About or Vision section with low opacity.
Microsoft logo in modern setting, can be used in trusted by/sponsor section.
Audible logo illuminated, can be used in trusted by/sponsor section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React app with Tailwind CSS and install framer-motion, @phosphor-icons/react, recharts, @react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei.
Implement Outfit font for headings and Manrope for body text via Google Fonts.
Build the Landing Page with the cosmic background, floating AI Orb (can be a glowing CSS/Framer motion sphere or a simple 3D sphere), and a 'Tetris Grid' for features.
Build the Student Dashboard with the 'Control Room' bento grid, glassmorphic cards, and Recharts for analytics.
Build the AI Learning Studio featuring a 3D model placeholder (using react-three-fiber for a basic shape if complex models aren't available) and an AI chat sidebar.
Build the Pricing page with premium glassmorphism tiers.
Ensure the entire app uses #030712 as the root background, with layered aurora gradients.
Do NOT use raw HTML <select> or <input type='date'>; customize Shadcn UI or build custom accessible glass inputs.
CRITICAL: Add data-testid to all buttons, links, and forms.
